DO_NOT_USE: any placeholder robot or blank-face sprite

PLAYER_CHARACTER.notes: Use this as the starting player character. Do not render a robot placeholder.

ROOM_START.notes: Render centered. If image still shows border/label artifacts, crop in code using Phaser frame or CSS container clipping.

SLOTS.rule: For level 1 render only first 5 positions. Do not render 20 active circles at level 1.
